name: Holo SDK
summary: A spatial, self-authoring desktop where every window, component and world is a verifiable object.

description.p: A desktop should be something you can reshape and author, not a fixed surface.
An infinite canvas mounts each holospace as an isolated, capability-bounded window through the single-link launcher; every object is a self-verifying, content-addressed node.

ul: An infinite canvas of draggable windows
Each window is an isolated, capability-bounded holospace
Every object is a verifiable UOR node

releases.description: The spatial self-authoring shell: native block runtime, content-addressed scene-graph CvRDT, single-link isolated window mounts, in-place component authoring with a κ derivation chain.
